creator: hiroo.ono+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Not the official successor, but I maintain hikari here:
https://hub.darcs.net/hiroo/hikari/changes
Though there is only one developer (me) and I only know 2 users including me.

Currently,

* updated wlroots to 0,18
* Supported wlr-input-method-unstable-v2 and wlr-text-input-unstable-v3 protocols
* Partially supported wlr-output-management-unstable-v1 protocol
* Included small patches found in hub.darcs.net

The developing speed is quite slow. I am only planning to finish wlr-output-management-unstable-v1 protocol and adapt to upcoming wlroots-0.19 this year, but will be eager to implement other wlr protocols if there are requests.
